data.subtitle: Who I'm
data.title: Hello, I'm Dr. Sisir Kumar Mondal
data.description: With years of experience in clinical psychiatry and mental wellness, I’m dedicated to helping individuals live balanced, healthy, and fulfilling lives. My approach combines evidence-based treatments, compassionate care, and modern medical techniques to ensure the best possible outcomes for every patient. I strongly believe that healing begins with understanding — and every consultation is a step toward your emotional and mental well-being. I have 25+ years of clinical experience in both Psychiatric Medical Hospitals and private practice settings. Expert in diagnostic assessment, psychopharmacology, and evidence-based psychotherapies (CBT, DBT-informed, psychodynamic). Committed to compassionate, patient-centered care and advancing mental health equity.
features: Personalized Treatment Plans for Anxiety, Depression, and Stress
Holistic Healing Through Therapy and Medication Management
Emergency & Express Mental Health Support Services

data.title: What my Patients Says
data.subtitle: Testimonial
data.description: This is a great site for everything around the home, and it also has a useful section. You can see the best products.

testimonials.name: Mathilde Langevin
testimonials.title: CEO at Apple
testimonials.content: Need a consultation regarding your treatment or diagnosis? I'm always ready to provide you with professional healthcare consulting that is offered at an affordable price. At MedoX, you can expect nothing less than the ultimate level of care.

testimonials.name: Ananya Sharma
testimonials.title: Satisfied Patient
testimonials.content: The care I received was exceptional. The doctor patiently listened to my concerns and explained every detail. My skin feels so much healthier now!

testimonials.name: Rohan Mehta
testimonials.title: Entrepreneur
testimonials.content: I was struggling with recurring acne for years. After just a few sessions here, I noticed a visible improvement. Highly recommended for anyone seeking expert dermatological care.

testimonials.name: Priya Verma
testimonials.title: Marketing Manager
testimonials.content: The clinic is well-maintained and the staff is friendly. The doctor’s treatment plan was spot-on — my pigmentation issues have reduced drastically.

testimonials.name: Aditya Narang
testimonials.title: Software Engineer
testimonials.content: I had a great experience! The consultation was thorough and the treatment worked wonders. The results were better than I expected.

testimonials.name: Dr. Sneha Iyer
testimonials.title: Physiotherapist
testimonials.content: As a healthcare professional myself, I appreciate the doctor’s precision and attention to detail. The overall patient care and hygiene standards are excellent.

data.title: My Insights & Articles
data.subtitle: Blog Post
data.description: Stay informed with expert advice, skincare insights, and wellness tips curated to help you lead a healthy and confident life.

posts.title: Having Overweight and Depression Can Be Connected
posts.excerpt: Recent studies show a strong connection between mental health and physical wellness. Learn how managing your weight can improve your mood and overall well-being.
posts.author: Dr. Smith

posts.title: 5 Everyday Habits That Damage Your Skin
posts.excerpt: From skipping sunscreen to not getting enough sleep — discover the daily mistakes that might be harming your skin without you realizing it.
posts.author: Dr. Ananya Rao

posts.title: Understanding Acne: Causes, Myths, and Effective Treatments
posts.excerpt: Acne affects people of all ages. Let’s break down what really causes it and explore science-backed treatments that actually work.
posts.author: Dr. Rohan Verma

posts.title: How Stress Impacts Your Skin Health
posts.excerpt: Stress doesn’t just affect your mind — it can lead to breakouts, dullness, and even premature aging. Here’s how to manage it effectively.
posts.author: Dr. Sneha Iyer

posts.title: Top Anti-Aging Treatments That Really Work

posts.title: Monsoon Skincare: How to Keep Your Skin Fresh and Clear
posts.excerpt: Humidity and pollution during monsoon can wreak havoc on your skin. Follow these dermatologist-approved tips for glowing, healthy skin all season long.

data.description: Providing compassionate and professional healthcare services with a focus on patient well-being and medical excellence.

data.institution: All India Institute of Medical Sciences (AIIMS)
data.description: Completed Doctorate in Dermatology with specialization in cosmetic and medical skin treatments. Gained extensive research and clinical experience in advanced skincare procedures.
Completed Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS), acquiring foundational medical knowledge and clinical skills in general medicine, surgery, and patient care.
data.alt_text: MBBS degree certificate from Kolkata Medical College

data.description: Specialized diploma in cosmetic dermatology, mastering non-surgical procedures, skin rejuvenation, and patient-specific aesthetic treatments.

data.title: Consultant Dermatologist
data.description: Providing expert dermatology consultations, advanced skin treatments, and aesthetic procedures. Leading a team of dermatologists to ensure top-quality patient care and results.

data.title: Dermatology Resident
data.description: Gained hands-on experience in patient care, clinical procedures, and dermatology research. Assisted in complex cases under senior dermatologists and developed advanced procedural skills.
